messages.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS candidate_count FROM candidates;

title: how many male candidates are there?

messages.text: how many male candidates are there?

messages.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM candidates 
WHERE gender = 'male'

messages.text: how many female candidates are there?

messages.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM candidates 
WHERE gender = 'female'

title: how many pget profile candidates are there?

messages.text: how many pget profile candidates are there?

messages.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM candidates 
WHERE profile = 'pget' 
LIMIT 200;

messages.text: how many female pget candidates are there?

messages.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM candidates 
WHERE gender = 'Female' 
  AND profile = 'PGET' 
  AND isManual = 0
LIMIT 200;

title: How many candidates are there in total?

messages.text: How many candidates are there in total?

messages.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_candidates FROM candidates;

SELECT c.id, c.email, c.discipline, c.profile, c.gender, c.zone1, c.zone2, c.zone3, c.business1, c.business2, c.business3, c.meritscore
FROM candidates c
WHERE c.allocated_zone IS NULL AND c.allocated_business IS NULL AND c.allocated_ic IS NULL
LIMIT 200;

rows.discipline: NIMCAR Quantitative Surveying and Contracts Management
